# Zeta

Zeta is a system for handling broadcast events across [[alpha]]'s
process pool. Sometimes referred to as the Z-pattern in older docs.

## Aliases

This page has three aliases (zeta-system, zeta-pattern, Z-pattern) so
the alias-resolution path has something non-trivial to exercise.
